input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.9.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.9.5.1
            TITLE: the vehicle must make a characteristic sound when it is ready to drive

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.9.5.1: The vehicle must make a characteristic sound when it is Ready to Drive
EV.9.5.1 The vehicle must make a characteristic sound when it is Ready to Drive

final_answer: The vehicle must make a characteristic sound when it is Ready to Drive
